reach_why: Applies broadly to continual learning, concept drift, memory updating, and adaptive intelligence across many domains.
novelty_why: Reframes stability-plasticity as preserving drift within knowledge, using unusual craft metaphors to unify adaptation and retention.
falsifiable_why: Partly testable by comparing partial-update systems against full retraining under drift, though metaphorical claims remain vague.
explanation: Intelligence endures change by integrating drift into existing structure rather than repeatedly replacing everything.
